name: Countdown_Clock
prompt:
Create a professional book cover for a nonfiction investigative journalism book.
Portrait orientation, vertical book cover format, aspect ratio 2:3.

Design: A massive, brutalist concrete clock face dominating the center of the cover, its hands pointing to 11:47 — almost midnight. The clock is cracked and weathering, with pieces crumbling away from its edges. Behind it, a dark blood-red sky fading to black at the top and bottom. Thin digital data lines and faint graph curves overlay the background like ghostly projections — suggesting computer models and data. The overall mood is ominous, urgent, cinematic. Dark palette: deep crimson, charcoal, rust, and bone white.

Typography:
- Title "COUNTDOWN TO COLLAPSE" in bold, condensed sans-serif font (like Oswald or Impact), pure white, large, placed at the top third of the cover, slightly above the clock
- Subtitle "THE 2040 CRISIS" in smaller caps, muted gold/amber color, directly below the title
- Author name "MICHAEL RODRIGUEZ" in thin, spaced-out sans-serif, white, at the very bottom of the cover

Ominous, urgent, premium nonfiction book cover. No real faces. No photographs.

name: Burning_Hourglass
prompt:
Create a professional book cover for a nonfiction civilizational risk book.
Portrait orientation, vertical book cover format, aspect ratio 2:3.

Design: A stylized hourglass in the center of the cover. The top half of the hourglass contains a glowing, thriving modern city skyline — skyscrapers lit up, highways flowing with light. The bottom half shows the same city in ruins — crumbling buildings, overgrown vegetation, dark and abandoned. Sand flows between them, each grain glowing like an ember. The background is a deep midnight blue with subtle mathematical equations and data grid lines faintly visible. The mood is haunting and beautiful — decay as art.

Typography:
- Title "COUNTDOWN TO COLLAPSE" in sharp, angular serif font, bright white with a subtle red glow effect, placed above the hourglass at the top
- Subtitle "THE 2040 CRISIS" in condensed all-caps sans-serif, amber/gold, just below the title
- Author name "MICHAEL RODRIGUEZ" in elegant thin sans-serif, white, at the bottom below the hourglass

Cinematic, thought-provoking, premium nonfiction aesthetic. No real human faces.

name: Data_Apocalypse
prompt:
Create a professional book cover for a nonfiction data-driven analysis book.
Portrait orientation, vertical book cover format, aspect ratio 2:3.

Design: A dark, nearly black background. In the center, a single downward-curving line graph rendered in bright, glowing red-orange — like a trajectory plunging off a cliff. The line starts high on the left and crashes down to the right, trailing particles and fragments as it falls — as if the data itself is disintegrating. Faint vertical grid lines in dark gray create a sense of cold, clinical analysis. Small clusters of data points and numbers float around the curve, barely visible. The overall mood is stark, clinical, alarming — like a classified briefing document.

Typography:
- Title "COUNTDOWN TO COLLAPSE" in bold, blocky sans-serif font, stark white, positioned in the upper portion of the cover
- Subtitle "THE 2040 CRISIS" in smaller condensed caps, neon red-orange matching the graph line, directly below the title
- Author name "MICHAEL RODRIGUEZ" in minimal, thin sans-serif, light gray, at the very bottom

Minimalist, data-driven, ominous. Like a Wall Street crash chart meets dystopian thriller. Premium nonfiction cover.

name: Split_World
prompt:
Create a professional book cover for a nonfiction civilizational collapse book.
Portrait orientation, vertical book cover format, aspect ratio 2:3.

Design: The cover is split vertically down the middle with a jagged, cracking line — like a fracture through concrete or reality itself. The LEFT half shows a prosperous modern world: clean city skyline, green parks, bright sky with warm golden light, a sense of order and civilization at its peak. The RIGHT half shows the same scene but degraded: the buildings are weathered, some crumbling; the sky is overcast and smoky; the parks are brown and dry; the infrastructure is visibly failing. The crack between them glows with a subtle amber light, as if reality itself is splitting apart. The transition is dramatic but artistic.

Typography:
- Title "COUNTDOWN TO COLLAPSE" in bold, industrial sans-serif font, white with a slight shadow for readability, spanning across both halves in the upper third
- Subtitle "THE 2040 CRISIS" in condensed caps, warm amber/gold, centered below the title
- Author name "MICHAEL RODRIGUEZ" in clean, thin sans-serif, white, at the bottom center

Dramatic, cinematic, thought-provoking. Premium nonfiction cover showing the contrast between prosperity and decline. No real human faces.
